attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"question": "Carry On is a 4-CD career retrospective box set by Stephen Stills, including tracks with the vocal folk rock supergroup named what?"}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"trajectory": {"thought_0": "I need to find out the name of the vocal folk rock supergroup that Stephen Stills was a part of, as mentioned in the context of the \"Carry On\" box set. This information is likely available on Wikipedia.", "tool_name_0": "search_wikipedia", "tool_args_0": {"query": "Stephen Stills vocal folk rock supergroup"}, "observation_0": ["Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young | Crosby, Stills & Nash (CSN) was a vocal folk rock supergroup made up of American singer-songwriters David Crosby and Stephen Stills and English singer-songwriter Graham Nash. They were known as Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young (CSNY) when joined by Canadian singer-songwriter Neil Young, who was an occasional fourth member. They were noted for their intricate vocal harmonies, often tumultuous interpersonal relationships, political activism, and lasting influence on US music and culture. Crosby, Stills & Nash were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and all three members were also inducted for their work in other groups (Crosby for the Byrds, Stills for Buffalo Springfield and Nash for the Hollies). Neil Young has also been inducted as a solo artist and as a member of Buffalo Springfield.", "The Young Men | The Young Men was a Hong Kong folk/rock band in the late 1960s and early 1970s featured in the local media as the answer to the super American band Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young. The group consisted of Stephen Lam (lead vocal, guitars, harmonicas), Ralph Wong (vocal, guitars, harmonicas), and Karl Wu (vocal, guitars, keyboard). They performed in the 1971 Hong Kong Festival and were regularly as featured artist in the Hong Kong TVB variety TV show - Enjoy Yourself Tonight in the early 1970s.", "The Rides | The Rides are an American blues supergroup, featuring guitarists Stephen Stills, Kenny Wayne Shepherd and keyboardist Barry Goldberg."], "thought_1": "I have found that Stephen Stills was part of the vocal folk rock supergroup called Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young (CSNY). This is the information I need to answer the question about the \"Carry On\" box set. This group is well-known for their intricate vocal harmonies and significant impact on music and culture, which aligns with the context of the \"Carry On\" box set that features Stills' career.", "answer": "Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young"}

attributes.name: "search_wikipedia"
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: ["Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young | Crosby, Stills & Nash (CSN) was a vocal folk rock supergroup made up of American singer-songwriters David Crosby and Stephen Stills and English singer-songwriter Graham Nash. They were known as Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young (CSNY) when joined by Canadian singer-songwriter Neil Young, who was an occasional fourth member. They were noted for their intricate vocal harmonies, often tumultuous interpersonal relationships, political activism, and lasting influence on US music and culture. Crosby, Stills & Nash were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and all three members were also inducted for their work in other groups (Crosby for the Byrds, Stills for Buffalo Springfield and Nash for the Hollies). Neil Young has also been inducted as a solo artist and as a member of Buffalo Springfield.", "The Young Men | The Young Men was a Hong Kong folk/rock band in the late 1960s and early 1970s featured in the local media as the answer to the super American band Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young. The group consisted of Stephen Lam (lead vocal, guitars, harmonicas), Ralph Wong (vocal, guitars, harmonicas), and Karl Wu (vocal, guitars, keyboard). They performed in the 1971 Hong Kong Festival and were regularly as featured artist in the Hong Kong TVB variety TV show - Enjoy Yourself Tonight in the early 1970s.", "The Rides | The Rides are an American blues supergroup, featuring guitarists Stephen Stills, Kenny Wayne Shepherd and keyboardist Barry Goldberg."]

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
{"question": "Carry On is a 4-CD career retrospective box set by Stephen Stills, including tracks with the vocal folk rock supergroup named what?", "trajectory": "[[ ## thought_0 ## ]]

search_wikipedia

[[ ## tool_args_0 ## ]]
{"query": "Stephen Stills vocal folk rock supergroup"}

[[ ## observation_0 ## ]]
[1] «Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young | Crosby, Stills & Nash (CSN) was a vocal folk rock supergroup made up of American singer-songwriters David Crosby and Stephen Stills and English singer-songwriter Graham Nash. They were known as Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young (CSNY) when joined by Canadian singer-songwriter Neil Young, who was an occasional fourth member. They were noted for their intricate vocal harmonies, often tumultuous interpersonal relationships, political activism, and lasting influence on US music and culture. Crosby, Stills & Nash were inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and all three members were also inducted for their work in other groups (Crosby for the Byrds, Stills for Buffalo Springfield and Nash for the Hollies). Neil Young has also been inducted as a solo artist and as a member of Buffalo Springfield.»
[2] «The Young Men | The Young Men was a Hong Kong folk/rock band in the late 1960s and early 1970s featured in the local media as the answer to the super American band Crosby, Stills, Nash & Young. The group consisted of Stephen Lam (lead vocal, guitars, harmonicas), Ralph Wong (vocal, guitars, harmonicas), and Karl Wu (vocal, guitars, keyboard). They performed in the 1971 Hong Kong Festival and were regularly as featured artist in the Hong Kong TVB variety TV show - Enjoy Yourself Tonight in the early 1970s.»
[3] «The Rides | The Rides are an American blues supergroup, featuring guitarists Stephen Stills, Kenny Wayne Shepherd and keyboardist Barry Goldberg.»"}
